subject: Geography
title: K2: The Savage Mountain
description: Learn K2: The Savage Mountain in one minute.

hook.text: K2 is the second-tallest mountain but far deadlier than Everest.

buildup.text: One in four climbers who attempt the summit dies. Storms strike without warning.

discovery.text: It sits on the China-Pakistan border in the remote Karakoram Range.

twist.text: K2 has no easy route. Every path to the top crosses avalanche zones and ice walls.

climax.text: It wasn't summited in winter until 2021—the last 8,000-meter peak to fall.

punchline.text: Everest is higher. K2 is harder.

quiz.question: When was K2 first climbed in winter?
